summary: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: The 'Satışı Onayla' (Confirm Sale) button in SaleModal now responds when clicked. The fix (changing button from type='submit' to type='button' with onClick={handleSubmit}) successfully addresses the Radix UI Dialog form submission interception issue. Full sale flow tested: login -> inventory -> vehicle menu -> sale modal -> confirm sale -> car status changed to 'Satıldı'.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1), cosmetic only
Hydration warning about <span> inside <select>/<option> - cosmetic React warning

context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical bug fix verified. The 'Satışı Onayla' button in SaleModal now works correctly. Button changed from type='submit' to type='button' with onClick handler. Two sold cars exist in DB: BMW 320i and Mercedes E200. Test account: test-sale@emergent.com/password.

bug_fix_details.bug_description: The 'Satışı Onayla' (Confirm Sale) button in SaleModal was unresponsive when clicked
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Radix UI Dialog intercepts form submit events, preventing the sale from completing
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed button from type='submit' to type='button' with onClick={handleSubmit}
bug_fix_details.verification_result: PASSED - Button now responds and completes sale successfully
